question: What decision did the Turkish court make regarding Istanbul Mayor Ekrem Imamoglu, and what security measures were visible outside the Istanbul Justice Palace at the time?
answer: The court ordered the pre-trial detention of Istanbul Mayor Ekrem Imamoglu, and outside the Istanbul Justice Palace, police officers stood guard with barriers set up around the entrance.

video: Police officers stand guard outside the Istanbul Adalet Sarayı (Istanbul Justice Palace), with barriers set up around the entrance.
text: A Turkish court ordered the pre-trial detention of Istanbul Mayor Ekrem Imamoglu.
